DECLARATION OF ALEXANDER KALLIS FILED IN SUPPORT OF MOTION UNDER CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE SECTION 425.16 (ANTI-SLAPP) TO STRIKE THE COMPLAINT OF GIOVANNI CINCOTTA (TRANSACTION ID # 78171756) FILED BY DEFENDANT KALLIS, ALEXANDER
ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52 AS TO PLAINTIFF CINCOTTA, GIOVANNI

LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANT ALEXANDER KALLIS' MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT. DEFENDANT ALEXANDER KALLIS' ANTI-SLAPP MOTION TO STRIKE THE SOLE CAUSE OF ACTION ALLEGED IN THE COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF GIOVANNI CINCOTTA IS GRANTED. KALLIS HAS SHOWN THAT THE SOLE CAUSE ARISES FROM ACTIVITY PROTECTED BY THE ANTI-SLAPP STATUTE AND CINCOTTA HAS NOT SUBMITTED ANY EVIDENCE SHOWING THAT HIS CAUSE OF ACTION HAS MINIMAL MERIT. NO OPPOSITION FILED. COUNSEL FOR THE PREVAILING PARTY IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH REPEATS VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE COURT'S RULING. VISITING JUDGE: HAROLD E. KAHN; CLERK: W. TRUPEK; NOT REPORTED (301/HEK)

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-02-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT ALEXANDER KALLIS' MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT

Defendant Alexander Kallis' anti-SLAPP motion to strike the sole cause of action alleged in the complaint filed by plaintiff Giovanni Cincotta is granted. Kallis has shown that the sole cause arises from activity protected by the anti-SLAPP statute and Cincotta has not submitted any evidence showing that his cause of action has minimal merit. No opposition filed.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling.

Visiting Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (301/HEK)
